upstream.name: lsdefine/GenericAgent
upstream.release_context: post-v0.4.0 upstream review refresh; 7fede5a..4086d5c changed only agentmain.py model-reload handling and GenericAgent working-memory guidance in assets/tools_schema.json and ga.py

decision.reason: Latest upstream 4086d5c858b90e10eb24a106ea3c41ac729bc00e was checked with exact GitHub commit comparisons from 7fede5a050e440f6b4e78255d74b97be72f8749b. The two new commits only change agentmain.py model-reload handling and GenericAgent working-memory guidance in assets/tools_schema.json and ga.py; they do not modify assets/tmwd_cdp_bridge and have no browser67 capability to absorb. Existing extension drift remains background.js,browser67/managed-content.js,browser67/runtime.js,content.js,disable_dialogs.js,manifest.json; upstream background.js is still missing local enhanced bridge features (batch_uses_handle_tabs,cdp_tabid_validation,cookies_tabid_validation,handle_tabs_dispatch,include_unscriptable,numeric_tab_id_validation,tabs_close,tabs_get,unsupported_tabs_method,ws_exec_tabid_validation), so direct sync remains disabled and the local bridge stays authoritative.

absorbed_reference.notes: GenericAgent macljqCtrl/AX and ljqCtrl DPI/click-check ideas are retained as audited reference and diagnostics, not default execution providers.
